languages.text: {n}Вего-Ан хочет возразить, но замирает в нерешительности. Сцепив руки в умоляющем жесте, он оборачивается к вам.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Вего-Ан хочет возразить, но замирает в нерешительности. Сцепив руки в умоляющем жесте, он оборачивается к вам.{/n}
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

languages.text: {n}Vego-An wants to object, but freezes in indecision. He turns to you, clutching his hands in a begging gesture.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vego-An will Einspruch erheben, bleibt aber in seiner Unentschlossenheit stehen. Er wendet sich Ihnen zu und umklammert seine Hände in einer flehenden Geste.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Vego-An wants to object, but freezes in indecision. He turns to you, clutching his hands in a begging gesture.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Végo-An veut objecter, mais se fige dans l'indécision. Il se tourne vers vous en serrant les mains dans un geste de supplication.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Vego-An wants to object, but freezes in indecision. He turns to you, clutching his hands in a begging gesture.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vego-An 想要反对，但又犹豫不决。他转过身来，双手紧握做乞求状。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Vego-An wants to object, but freezes in indecision. He turns to you, clutching his hands in a begging gesture.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vego-An quiere protestar, pero se queda paralizado por la indecisión. Se vuelve hacia ti, apretando las manos en un gesto suplicante.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Vego-An wants to object, but freezes in indecision. He turns to you, clutching his hands in a begging gesture.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ベゴ＝アンは異議を唱えようとしたが、優柔不断で固まってしまった。両手を握りしめ、懇願するようなジェスチャーをしながら、あなたに向き直った。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Vego-An wants to object, but freezes in indecision. He turns to you, clutching his hands in a begging gesture.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vego-An itiraz etmek istiyor ama kararsızlık içinde donup kalıyor. Size dönüyor, ellerini yalvarır bir hareketle kavrıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Vego-An wants to object, but freezes in indecision. He turns to you, clutching his hands in a begging gesture.{/n}
